hero.title: HSE qualifications, delivered to your team.
hero.description: Bespoke cohorts of IOSH, NEBOSH, OSHA and IEMA programmes — at your site, in your LMS, or fully online. From single departments to multi-country rollouts.

intro: We work with corporate HSE leaders who need consistent, audit-ready training across their workforce. Whether you're standardising line-manager safety, onboarding 200 new joiners, or upskilling an internal HSE team toward NEBOSH — we deliver the cohort, the materials, the assessment and the certificate, all under one centre.

pillars.title: On-site, online or blended
pillars.description: Live classroom delivery at your venue, fully online cohorts via Zoom + LMS, or blended for distributed teams.

pillars.title: Audit-ready records
pillars.description: Attendance, assessment evidence and IV records ready for your awarding-body audits and ISO management reviews.

pillars.title: Branded learner experience
pillars.description: Co-branded materials, custom inductions, and integration with your LMS / SSO / HRIS where required.

pillars.title: Manager dashboards
pillars.description: Cohort-level progress reporting so HR and HSE leadership can track completion + competency in real time.

services.title: Open enrolment cohorts
services.description: We open a cohort to your team only. You set the dates, we run it.

services.title: On-site delivery
services.description: Our trainer at your venue, anywhere in MENA + South Asia. Travel + accommodation passed at cost.

services.title: Online + LMS bundle
services.description: Live tutorials over Zoom + 6-month LMS access for unlimited replays. Best for distributed teams.

services.title: Multi-cohort rollout
services.description: Quarterly cohorts across multiple sites, with progress dashboards and quarterly steering reviews.

services.title: Internal verifier (IV) support
services.description: Already running training in-house? We provide IV oversight + EQA audit readiness.

services.title: Bespoke e-learning track
services.description: Branded onboarding e-learning hosted in your LMS — built around your SOPs.

offers.title: Volume rollout
offers.description: Book 5 or more cohorts in 12 months — automatic 15% off the per-cohort fee.

offers.title: Early-bird Q1
offers.description: Cohorts confirmed before 31 March 2026 get 2 free seats per cohort.

offers.title: IOSH + IV bundle
offers.description: Add Internal Verifier support to any IOSH rollout for 25% off the standalone IV retainer.

cta.heading: Plan your next cohort.
cta.description: Tell us how many learners, when, and the certifications you need — we'll come back with a tailored proposal within one business day.
